はぁ～……泥だらけになっちゃったぁ～。<br>うぅ……、気持ち悪いよぉ～～……: *sigh*... I'm all covered in mud now. Ugh... This feels so gross...
あんな狭い通路、無理に通ろうとするからだろ。<br>先に何があるかわからないんだ:
That's because you tried to force your way through that narrow
passage. You don't know what's ahead, so be more careful.
だってだって、お宝の匂いがしたんだもんっ！ ……見つからなかったけど！<br>あ:
But, but! I smelled treasure! ...Even though I didn't find any! Aaaah, I
wanna go home and take a bath already!
風呂かぁ。そういや、この森の中で、<br>温泉が湧いているっていう報告があったな:
A bath, huh? Come to think of it, I did hear a report that there's a
hot spring in this forest.
温泉！？ それホント！？<br>ねぇ～、司令官！ そこに寄って、綺麗さっぱりして:
A hot spring! For real! Hey, Commander! Let's stop by there, get nice
and clean, then go home!
まだ、何の整備もしてないから天然温泉のままだぞ？:
We haven't done any maintenance yet, so it's still a natural hot
spring, you know?
それ、めちゃくちゃいい！<br>天然の露天風呂ってことでしょっ！？ 最高じゃない:
That's awesome! It's a natural open-air bath, isn't it? This is the
best!
俺もまだどんな温泉なのか見たことないしなぁ～……。<br>よし、調査も兼ねて行っ:
I haven't actually seen that hot spring myself either... Alright, let's
go check it out. We'll make it a survey too.
